description: Check out this clean and hard to find 2026 Ford F-450 Super Duty Platinum Crew Cab dually 4x4 that truly stands at the top of the heavy duty lineup. Finished in the rare Avalanche Gray exterior, this truck makes a strong first impression and lets everyone know it means business. This is the truck everyone looks for and few ever find. Built to handle serious work, this F-450 is ready for any job you throw at it, from daily demands to the toughest towing and hauling tasks without hesitation. Power comes from the all new 6.7 liter high output Powerstroke V8 turbo diesel engine paired with a smooth 10 speed automatic transmission. This setup delivers strong pull, steady power, and confidence whether you are loaded up or cruising down the highway. With dual rear wheels and a solid stance, this dually is made to work for you. Towing heavy trailers or hauling large loads does not stand in its way, and the FX4 off road package with skid plates adds extra capability when conditions get rough. The Platinum interior sets this truck apart with Black Onyx Platinum blue leather seating and premium finishes throughout. Heated and ventilated power front seats with memory, a heated steering wheel, ambient lighting, and a power sliding rear window make every drive comfortable and refined. Up front, technology and visibility shine with a large productivity screen, SYNC 4 with a 12 inch display, wireless charging, and the B&O Unleashed sound system. The 360 degree camera, front and rear parking sensors, and Pro Trailer Backup Assist make maneuvering this big truck easy. Exterior features include LED projector headlamps, rain sensing wipers, power running boards, front tow hooks, a power tailgate, and PowerScope telescoping trailer tow mirrors with power and heated glass. Every detail is designed to support work while keeping a clean and sharp look. This F-450 is loaded with smart towing tools like a trailer brake controller, trailer sway control, reverse brake assist, and adaptive cruise control. The camper package, Pro Power Onboard 2KW, and 14,000 pound GVWR package make it ready for serious use right away. Safety is built in with AdvanceTrac with roll stability control, safety canopy airbags, blind spot monitoring with cross traffic alert, and a full anti theft system. These features work together to help keep you confident and protected on every drive. This rare and practically brand new 2026 Ford F-450 Platinum dually is fully serviced and ready for its next owner. description: Discover the ultimate off-road companion in the 2024 Nissan Titan PRO-4X. This rugged and capable pickup truck is designed to conquer any terrain, whether you're tackling challenging trails or navigating the urban jungle.  Featuring a powerful 5.6L V8 engine that delivers 400 horsepower, the Titan PRO-4X is equipped to handle even the most demanding tasks. With its 4-wheel drive system and advanced off-road features, this truck is ready to take you on unforgettable adventures. Highlights include:   PRO-4X Utility Package: Includes a 120V outlet in the bed, Utilitrack system with tie-down cleats, LED under-rail bed lighting, LED tailgate area illumination, and front and rear parking sensors  PRO-4X Rugged Step Boards  Off-Road Protection Package: Includes crew cab interior door scuff protection, off-road adventure kit, adventure medic kit, and Pro-4X high-wall floor liners  PRO-4X Illuminated Kick Plate  PRO-4X Mud Flaps  Bed Assist Grip  USB Charging Cables  Beyond its exceptional off-road capabilities, the Titan PRO-4X offers a wealth of premium features to enhance your driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of NissanConnect with Navigation and Services, dual-zone automatic climate control, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM. The spacious and well-appointed cabin provides ample room for passengers and cargo, ensuring your journeys are as comfortable as they are thrilling.  Safety is also a top priority, with advanced driver assistance technologies like Blind Spot Warning, Rear Parking Sensors, and Auto High-beam Headlights keeping you and your loved ones secure on the road.  Whether you're tackling rugged terrain or navigating the city streets, the 2024 Nissan Titan PRO-4X is the ultimate companion. Experience the perfect blend of power, capability, and comfort in this exceptional pickup truck. description: Elevate Your Driving Experience with the Captivating 2025 Chevrolet Equinox RS  Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and cutting-edge technology with the exceptional 2025 Chevrolet Equinox RS. Under the hood, you'll find a powerful 1.5L DOHC engine mated to an 8-Speed Automatic transmission, delivering an impressive 24 city / 29 highway MPG.  Step inside this well-equipped SUV and you'll be greeted by a premium cabin that exudes quality and attention to detail. The Evotex Seat Trim and heated front seats provide unparalleled comfort, while the 8-way power driver's seat and 4-way manual front passenger seat ensure a personalized fit. The Chevrolet Infotainment 3 system, with its 11.3" Diagonal Advanced Color LCD Display, provides seamless connectivity and entertainment, keeping you connected on the go.  But the Equinox RS is more than just a pretty face. This SUV is packed with advanced safety features, including Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, and an Emergency Communication System, giving you and your loved ones the peace of mind you deserve.  The Equinox RS also boasts impressive handling and maneuverability, thanks to its 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, ABS Brakes, Traction Control, and Speed-Sensing Steering. Whether you're navigating city streets or tackling winding roads, this SUV delivers a confident and responsive driving experience.  As you can see, the 2025 Chevrolet Equinox RS is a truly remarkable vehicle that offers a winning combination of style, performance, and technology. We invite you to experience the difference for yourself. description: Discover the rugged appeal of this 2016 Jeep Wrangler Willys Wheeler, a true icon in the SUV segment. Cloaked in a sleek Black Clear Coat exterior, this used vehicle combines classic style with modern functionality. With only 32,180 miles on the odometer, it offers a compelling balance of performance and reliability. Powered by a robust 3.6-liter V6 engine that delivers 285 horsepower and 260 lb-ft of torque, this Wrangler is built for adventure. Its 5-speed automatic transmission ensures smooth shifting, while the 4X4 drive train provides confident handling across challenging terrains. Whether tackling off-road trails or city streets, this Jeep's naturally aspirated engine and 4WD capabilities make it a versatile choice for enthusiasts seeking both adventure and everyday usability. The Willys Wheeler trim enhances its rugged character with features like fog lights, Bluetooth connectivity, and satellite radio readiness, making every drive both practical and enjoyable. This Jeep Wrangler is equipped with a suite of safety and security features designed to keep you confident on every journey. Its 4-wheel Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) enhances stopping power and stability, especially in demanding conditions. Additionally, the off-road driving assist with hill descent control offers extra security when navigating steep or uneven terrain, ensuring a controlled descent without the need for constant brake application. These features make this vehicle an excellent choice for those who value safety and adventure readiness, whether on rugged trails or urban roads. In terms of entertainment and technology, this Wrangler keeps you connected and entertained with voice-operated hands-free phone call integration and radio systems, allowing you to focus on the road while staying in touch. The vehicle boasts a total of eight speakers providing clear sound, complemented by auxiliary audio inputs via USB and iPod/iPhone connectivity, ensuring your favorite music and audio content are always within reach. These features combine to create an engaging in-cabin experience, whether you're on a daily commute or embarking on a weekend adventure. Performance-wise, this Jeep Wrangler Willys Wheeler excels with its part-time 4WD system, offering drivers the ability to switch between 2WD and 4WD modes as needed. Its off-road tuned suspension provides enhanced stability and comfort when tackling rough terrain, while the manual high-lo setting on the 4WD selector gives you precise control over power distribution. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions. This upholstery simulates leather, is durable and easy to keep clean.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. For those who love to explore, the rugged exterior is complemented by the standard full-size spare tire, ensuring youre always ready for the unexpected. Safety is also a priority in the Wrangler Unlimited Sport, featuring advanced airbags and stability control for peace of mind on every journey. description: Discover the 2017 Toyota RAV4 LE: A Reliable Companion for Adventurous Souls Seeking Comfort, Safety, and Versatility in a Stylish Black Currant Metallic Finish Step into the world of adventure with the 2017 Toyota RAV4 LE, a used SUV that promises to be your steadfast companion on every journey. With its robust All-Wheel Drive (AWD) system, this RAV4 is engineered to tackle diverse terrains, ensuring a smooth ride whether you re navigating city streets or exploring off-the-beaten paths. The 4-cylinder engine paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission delivers a perfect blend of power and fuel efficiency, making it ideal for both daily commutes and weekend getaways. Safety is paramount in the RAV4 LE, featuring an array of advanced systems such as Lane Departure Warning, Lane Keeping Assist, and Front Collision Mitigation. These features work harmoniously to provide you with peace of mind on every drive. The Adaptive Cruise Control and Back-Up Camera enhance convenience, while Bluetooth Connectivity keeps you connected effortlessly. The Black Currant Metallic exterior adds a touch of sophistication, complemented by practical features like Privacy Glass and a Rear Spoiler. Inside, the spacious cabin offers comfortable cloth bucket seats and a versatile rear bench seat, ensuring ample room for passengers and cargo alike. Embrace the journey with the 2017 Toyota RAV4 LE. Be sure to call or visit Vandergriff Hyundai to discover more. Featuring four doors and a wheelbase of 103.9 inches, it provides ample space for up to five occupants within its two rows of seats.Equipped with a robust 2.5-liter naturally aspirated engine, this SUBARU Forester delivers a solid performance of 170 horsepower. The engine is paired with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), ensuring smooth and efficient power delivery. This vehicle's drivetrain is complimented by an All-Wheel Drive system, offering great traction and stability in various road conditions.Safety features include standard Anti-lock Braking System (ABS), standard Electronic Stability Control (ESC), and standard Direct Tire Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS). In the event of a collision, occupants are protected by multiple airbags throughout the vehicle, including front, side, knee, and curtain airbags.Convenience and comfort are key in the Forester Limited, with standard Manual seat belts, standard Daytime Running Lights, and standard Rear Visibility System for ease of parking. Additional features like standard Semiautomatic Headlamp Beam Switching and standard Blind Spot Monitor enhance the overall driving experience.This SUBARU Forester Limited is not just a car; it's a representation of Audi Napa Valley's commitment to providing exceptional customer service and community involvement. Join the Audi Napa Valley family to experience automotive excellence with a touch of caring service.[Image]WARNING: Operating, servicing and maintaining a passenger vehicle or off-road vehicle can expose you to chemicals including engine exhaust, carbon monoxide, phthalates, and lead, which are known to the State of California to cause cancer and birth defects or other reproductive harm. To minimize exposure, avoid breathing exhaust, do not idle the engine except as necessary, service your vehicle in a well-ventilated area and wear gloves or wash your hands frequently when servicing your vehicle. Experience unparalleled comfort with heated front sport seats , a heated steering wheel , and the Climatronic automatic climate control system, ensuring you re ready for any weather Jacksonville throws your way. Embrace the Lifestyle Picture yourself loading up for a weekend getaway with the family, utilizing the versatile 60-40 folding rear seats and expansive cargo space. This remarkable vehicle, with a mileage of just 84,243 miles, offers a premium driving experience that is second to none. As you slide into the plush tan leather interior, you'll immediately feel the embrace of luxury that only Cadillac can provide.  Under the hood, the CT6 boasts a robust 3.6L V6 engine, delivering an impressive 335 horsepower and 284 ft. lbs. of torque. This powerhouse ensures a thrilling ride every time you hit the road, while the 8-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission provides seamless gear changes for a smooth and responsive drive. Whether you're cruising the city streets or embarking on a long-distance journey, the CT6 promises to deliver a performance that is both exhilarating and efficient.  What sets the 2018 Cadillac CT6 Premium Luxury CSAV apart is its impeccable attention to detail and commitment to quality. This vehicle has been recognized with an Honorable Mention in Edmunds's Best Retained Value awards, a testament to its enduring value and reliability. Furthermore, it has earned a spot among the top models in J.D. Power and Associates's Vehicle Dependability Study (VDS), underscoring its reputation for exceptional dependability.  Step inside, and you'll be enveloped in an oasis of comfort and style. The tan leather seats not only offer a visually stunning contrast to the sleek exterior but also provide unmatched comfort for both driver and passengers. Every journey becomes a luxurious escape, with ample space and thoughtful design ensuring that every drive is as enjoyable as the destination itself.  The 2018 Cadillac CT6 Premium Luxury CSAV is not just about performance and comfort; it's also about making a statement. Its bold design and commanding presence on the road make it a standout choice for those who demand the best. The sleek lines and sophisticated styling are complemented by a range of manufacturer options and packages that enhance both aesthetics and functionality, allowing you to tailor the vehicle to your exact preferences.  Imagine the confidence of driving a vehicle that not only meets but exceeds your expectations. With its award-winning dependability and impressive retained value, the CT6 offers peace of mind and a sound investment for the discerning buyer. Whether you're navigating the daily commute or exploring new horizons, this Cadillac is your perfect companion, offering a driving experience that is both exhilarating and reassuring.  In conclusion, the 2018 Cadillac CT6 Premium Luxury CSAV is more than just a vehicle; it's a statement of style, power, and sophistication. With its powerful engine, luxurious interior, and award-winning dependability, it offers an unparalleled driving experience that is sure to impress. Don't miss the opportunity to own this exceptional vehicle that promises to deliver a lifetime of luxury and performance. Visit us today and experience the Cadillac CT6 for yourself  where every journey is a journey in luxury.

Beyond its efficient powertrain, the Kicks is equipped with a host of amenities to elevate your driving experience. Step inside the well-appointed cabin and you'll find cloth seating, a tilt and telescoping steering wheel, and a trip computer to keep you informed on your journey.  Whether you're navigating the city streets or embarking on weekend getaways, this 2018 Nissan Kicks S is the perfect companion. The 300S Alloy Package adds a touch of luxury and style to this already impressive vehicle. Now, let's talk about the factory default features that make this car stand out.   Inside, you'll find premium materials and craftsmanship throughout the cabin. The seats are not only comfortable but stylish, providing both support and elegance. The advanced infotainment system keeps you connected and entertained on every drive.   Moving to the exterior, the bold design of the Chrysler 300 Series S is sure to turn heads wherever you go. The sleek lines and distinctive grille give this sedan a commanding presence on the road.   With a fuel efficiency of 19 MPG in the city and 30 MPG on the highway, this vehicle offers both power and efficiency. Plus, with its clean CARFAX report and excellent overall condition, you can have peace of mind knowing you're getting a top-quality vehicle.   If you're looking for a combination of performance, style, and comfort, the 2018 Chrysler 300 Series S is the perfect choice for you. Visit us today to experience this exceptional sedan in person! The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision.Technology and Telematics Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle. description: ?? 2025 Chevrolet Colorado Trail Boss  Where Adventure Punches the Clock ??Meet the truck thats ready to clock out of work and clock into fun  the 2025 Chevrolet Colorado Trail Boss, now hanging out here at FH Dailey Chevrolet in San Leandro, CA! This beast blends off-road swagger, turbocharged muscle, and everyday comfort into one seriously capable ride. If your weekends involve dirt, towing toys, or simply showing off something awesome in your driveway this is your truck.?? Turbo Power That Doesnt Play AroundGet ready  this Trail Boss packs Chevrolets mighty TurboMax 2.7L engine, cranking out 310 horsepower and a wild 430 lb-ft of torque for a punchy, confident drive. Pair that with 4WD and an 8-speed automatic, and youre looking at a truck that can tow up to 7,700 lbs without breaking a sweat. Bring the boat. Bring the trailer. Bring ALL the toys.Sources: J.D. Power, CarEdge [jdpower.com], [caredge.com]?? Inside: Comfort Meets Lets Go!The inside of the Trail Boss is where rugged meets refined. Settle in with:Push-button start (no more key juggling)Available heated seats AND heated steering wheel (goodbye cold mornings!)Wireless charging + multiple USB portsAn available 8-way power driver seat for maximum captain vibesRoom for five, so your adventure crew rolls togetherIts practical, comfy, and ready for playlists, road trips, and Monday-morning bragging rights.Source: CarEdge [caredge.com]??? Adventure With Backup  LiterallySafety comes standard so you can explore with confidence. The 2025 Trail Boss includes:Automatic Emergency BrakingBlind Spot MonitoringLane Departure WarningRearview cameraStability + traction controlTranslation? You can enjoy the fun stuff, and your truck has your back.Sources: J.D. Power, CarEdge [jdpower.com], [caredge.com]?? Exterior That Says Lets Go Off-Road, Right NowThis truck LOOKS ready for adventure because it is. With:18-inch alloy wheelsAll-terrain tiresOff-road-tuned suspensionSliding rear window & rear defoggerTons of available bed upgradesThis thing is practically begging for a dirt trail. description: Check out this 2024 Toyota Sienna LE finished in Ice Cap with a BLACK interior.   This vehicle is equipped with the following features and options:    Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     ICE CAP  A copy of the Carfax is always available!  One Owner!    Why Buy From Jacobs Mitsubishi? At Jacobs Mitsubishi, we sell excellent new Mitsubishi models and reliable used vehicles. We are more than just a dealership - we have your back at every step of vehicle ownership. Not only will you find the newest and best from the Mitsubishi brand, but our team will also deliver exceptional customer service focused on your needs. Our full-service dealership offers a large selection of vehicles, in-house financing and leasing options, professional maintenance and repairs, and a fully virtual online shopping experience for a modern take on buying, selling, and trading vehicles in New Port Richey, FL. Whether you prefer shopping completely contact-free or want a friendly face to guide you through the car shopping experience, our team is ready to assist you. description: **2018 Subaru Forester 2.0XT Touring  Adventure Awaits!**  Get ready to elevate your driving experience with the stunning 2018 Subaru Forester 2.0XT Touring! This versatile SUV not only boasts a sleek Crystal White Pearl exterior that turns heads wherever you go, but it also comes packed with features designed to make every journey enjoyable and comfortable.  Under the hood, you'll find a powerful 2.0L Turbocharged H4 engine, delivering an impressive 250 horsepower and 258 ft-lbs of torque. This robust performance ensures you have the power you need for both city driving and weekend adventures. Plus, with fuel efficiency ratings of 23 MPG in the city and 27 MPG on the highway, you can enjoy your travels without constantly worrying about fuel stops.  Step inside, and you'll be greeted by a beautifully appointed Saddle Brown interior that exudes warmth and sophistication. The spacious cabin is designed with both comfort and convenience in mind, featuring leather-trimmed seats that provide an upscale feel. The drivers seat is power-adjustable, making it easy to find your perfect driving position.  The Forester 2.0XT Touring is equipped with a wide array of factory default features to enhance your driving experience. Stay connected and entertained with the Subaru Starlink multimedia system, which includes a 7-inch touchscreen, Bluetooth connectivity, and smartphone integration for Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Enjoy your favorite music through the premium audio system with 8 speakers, or navigate effortlessly with the built-in GPS.  Safety is a top priority in the Forester, and this model comes loaded with advanced features, including Subaru's EyeSight Driver Assist Technology. This system includes adaptive cruise control, pre-collision braking, lane departure warning, and more, ensuring peace of mind on every drive. Additionally, the rearview camera and blind-spot monitoring add extra layers of safety for you and your passengers.  With ample cargo space and split-folding rear seats, the Forester is ready for any adventure, whether you're heading to the mountains or running errands around town. Plus, this vehicle comes with a CARFAX REPORT SHOWING EXELLENT DEALER MAINTENANCE HISTORY, so you can buy with confidence knowing it has been well-maintained.  In summary, the 2018 Subaru Forester 2.0XT Touring is the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and safety. Dont miss out on the opportunity to own this exceptional SUV thats ready to take you on your next journey. description: Thank for choosing Iowa Auto Exchange! This Cortina White 2018 Audi Q3 Sport Premium would be a welcome addition to your family/business.       Comfort Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions.Convenience Cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; cruise control. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.      To be sure you don't miss out, give us a call at 515-214-2766 and schedule a  vip test drive. We are located at 1410 NE Broadway Ave Des Moines IA 50313.
